title: Roadmaps
description: This section is now intentionally thin.
html:
Roadmaps

This section is now intentionally thin.

Most of the old roadmap material has been removed from the public docs tree. What remains here is only a minimal landing page and a small number of repository artifacts that are not part of the rendered documentation site.

What still lives here

  • docs/08-roadmaps/README.md: this landing page
  • docs/08-roadmaps/gbif-challenge-2026.html: standalone presentation kept in the repository, but not published in the rendered docs site

Why this section changed

The old roadmap folder had become a mix of target architecture, execution plans, GUI rollout notes, and temporary analysis documents. Keeping all of that as a public top-level section made the docs harder to trust and harder to navigate, so the surviving public docs now point readers back to current architecture in ../07-architecture/README.md instead of treating old planning material as active reference content.
